::: panel-tabset
## R

``` r
Sys.getenv("QUARTO_DOCUMENT_PATH")
```

## Python

``` python
import os
print(os.environ["QUARTO_DOCUMENT_PATH"])
```

## Julia

``` julia
ENV["QUARTO_DOCUMENT_PATH"]
```
:::

+--------+----------------+
| Var    | Description    |
+========+================+
| `A`    | Example value. |
+--------+----------------+

For more information, see [Quarto engine execution information](./quarto-execute-info.qmd).
